summary: Focus on foundational infrastructure then end-to-end pipeline

items.title: Add CommandRunner interface for testable exec
items.body:
## Problem

Every component shells out to opencode or gh CLI. Tests need mocks.

## Impact

Blocks TDD on all pipeline components.

## Suggested Approach

Create internal/exec with CommandRunner interface and MockRunner.
items.vision_alignment: Enables reliable development of all vision features

items.title: Implement end-to-end council execution
items.body:
## Problem

Council command is a stub. Users cannot run crucible.

## Impact

Project is unusable without working council pipeline.

## Suggested Approach

Implement council spawner, integrate with model registry, wire to CLI.

conflicts_resolved.item: Add progress indicators during council run
conflicts_resolved.disagreement: STRATEGIST rated p2, not proposed by others
conflicts_resolved.resolution: Deferred to next horizon — usable without progress indicators

dropped_items.title: Add progress indicators during council run
dropped_items.reason: Nice-to-have, not on critical path. Deferred to v0.2.0.
